title: Diabetic-Friendly Caster Sugar Crumble with Garlic
description: A delectable diabetic-friendly Indian dish featuring a crisp sugar crumble topped with garlic for added flavor and texture.

ingredients.name: crushed walnuts or almonds (optional for texture)

instructions: Mix caster sugar, flour, softened butter, and Greek yogurt together until a crumbly consistency is achieved.
If using, mix in crushed nuts for added texture and flavor.
Line a baking dish with parchment paper or spray with cooking spray. Press the mixture evenly into the dish.
Bake in preheated oven for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown.
Remove from oven and let cool before serving.
